title: Corrective fix for B-77b774d3: Delete legacy orchestrator test file after CLI migration
description:
Blocked reason: tests/test_orchestrator.py contains 65 unique tests not migrated by dependency beads. Groups: CLI commands (test_command_plan/summary/tui, test_build_parser, test_cli_handoff/retry/summary), TUI internals (test_tui_*), worker prompts (test_worker_prompt_* and related), schema (test_agent_output_schema_*, test_planner_output_schema_*), planner (test_planner_*, test_write_plan_*), graph (test_render_bead_graph_*), storage (test_allocate/resolve_bead_id_*, test_list_beads_*, test_old_sequential_ids_*). Deletion now violates acceptance criterion 2: 'No intended CLI or scheduler test coverage is lost during deletion.'

Remaining work: Migrate all 65 remaining unique tests from test_orchestrator.py to appropriate dedicated files before deletion. Grouped by area: (1) CLI commands — test_command_plan_*, test_command_summary_*, test_command_tui_*, test_build_parser_*, test_cli_handoff_*, test_cli_retry_*, test_cli_summary_* → new test_cli_plan.py, test_cli_summary.py, test_cli_tui.py; (2) TUI internals — test_tui_* → extend or replace test_tui.py; (3) Worker prompts — test_worker_prompt_*, test_build_planner_prompt_*, test_load_guardrail_template_*, test_review_and_tester_templates_*, test_render_context_snippets_* → new test_prompts.py; (4) Schema — test_agent_output_schema_*, test_planner_output_schema_* → new test_schemas.py; (5) Planner — test_planner_*, test_write_plan_* → new test_planner.py; (6) Graph — test_render_bead_graph_* → new test_graph.py; (7) Storage — test_allocate_bead_id_*, test_resolve_bead_id_*, test_list_beads_*, test_old_sequential_ids_* → extend test_scheduler_beads.py or new test_storage.py. After all migrations, delete test_orchestrator.py.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-77b774d3.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.
block_reason: Deferred due to file-scope conflict with active bead B-af1b903c-test

execution_history.summary: Deferred due to file-scope conflict with active bead B-af1b903c-test
